videos.title: Stowe Derby Returns
videos.description: The annual Stowe Derby brought racers of all skill levels and ages to compete from the top of Mount Manfield to downtown Stowe.
videos.transcript:

videos.title: 2022 Stowe Derby: Short, Fast, and Icy!
videos.description: It was a freezing cold, icy day in Vermont for the 2022 Stowe Derby. It was 50 degrees the day before, but the high on race day was 10. Conditions were firm, fast, and treacherous. Owing to some apparent grooming challenges on the lower course , there was a last minute change in the course. The planned 20k race ended at the base of Mansfield at the Stowe Nordic Center parking lot, around 7k total. Starting off not knowing this, it came as quite a surprise to everyone to cross the finish line minutes after starting. A few determined racers actually completed the race all the way into Stow to the traditional finish line. Hats off to those for braving the ice and completing the race! Our own post-race recon of skiing the course from the traditional finish line up found icy but passable conditions up until the trail entered the forest off of the Stowe Recreation path.
